commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ddabb9edfe883e73b98725bcd90444c48a63e58c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves cron doctor migration helpers under `src/commands/doctor/cron/`, keeps `src/commands/doctor-cron.ts` as the wrapper entrypoint, and moves legacy cron JSONL run-log migration ownership out of `src/cron/run-log.ts`.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +25. Total +51 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR findings: the PR head check data shows the architecture lane failing, and the source diff shows the new `run-log.ts` <-> `run-log-jsonl.ts` static cycle. The CodeQL path issue is also source-reproducible from the renamed file and unchanged workflow/config references.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are mechanical: remove the new import cycle, update stale CodeQL memory routing paths, and add real migration proof.

target.title: Refactor cron migrations under doctor
target.body:
## Summary
- Move cron doctor migration helpers into `src/commands/doctor/cron/` while keeping the existing `doctor-cron` wrapper entrypoint for dynamic imports.
- Move legacy cron run-log JSONL discovery/import/archive code out of core `src/cron/run-log.ts` and into doctor migration ownership.
- Keep core run-log runtime on SQLite append/read/query paths, with shared JSONL parsing only for stored row recovery and doctor import.
- Add a large legacy run-log migration regression covering reruns when archive cleanup is blocked.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/cron/index.test.ts src/commands/doctor/cron/store-migration.test.ts src/commands/doctor/cron/legacy-delivery.test.ts src/commands/doctor/cron/dreaming-payload-migration.test.ts src/commands/doctor/cron/dreaming-payload-migration.constants-drift.test.ts src/cron/run-log.test.ts src/cron/run-log.error-reason.test.ts src/cron/store.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/run-log.test.ts src/cron/run-log.error-reason.test.ts src/commands/doctor/cron/index.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed --timed`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real Behavior Proof
Behavior addressed: Cron doctor owns legacy JSON store/run-log migration, while core cron run-log runtime stays on SQLite for normal append/read/query.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout with Node/pnpm repo wrappers.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Focused doctor/cron Vitest files, focused run-log rerun after autoreview fix, changed gate, and local autoreview.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed, changed gate passed, and autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Legacy run-log migration dedupes all existing SQLite rows on rerun even when the legacy JSONL archive is blocked; new core run-log writes still do not create legacy run-log files.
What was not tested: Full release CI and cross-OS Crabbox lanes were not run for this refactor-only cleanup.
target.author: steipete
